title: Lad's 3D Rails & Ladders
description: 3D Rails and Ladders in a simple, optimized, no compromises approach
body:
Lad's 3D Rails & Ladders adds exactly that with optimized block models, no stretched sloped rails, few compromises, a simplistic approach, and pixel perfection. A lot of tedious math was used to make everything align as much as possible. It also includes a 3D version of the curved rail texture from [LavidaCraft](https://modrinth.com/project/a3HPkcZA).

<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
  
You may:
- Modify this pack for personal use
- Create and publish modified versions (preferably add me as a member of the project, but this is not required)
- Include this project in modpacks uploaded to Modrinth

You may not:
- Reupload or redistribute this pack as a whole in unmodified form. You must at least modify one asset in a visible way.

</details>


<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Resource packs are almost always backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>

If you have a feature request, feel free to create an issue on my issue tracker

Consider leaving a small tip on Venmo? @Lad_Flaver
